_comment: Manifest read by installed copies of Whisper Dictate. The app polls this once a day. Update this file as part of the release process; commit + push are sufficient (no tag needed). The 'version' field follows SemVer; the 'installer_url' must point at a downloadable .exe asset on a public release of this repo.
release_notes_md:
First broadly-testable release. Three real bugs fixed (each caught by Windows Sandbox cold-install testing), plus polish.

**Fixed:**
- Wrong clipboard contents pasted instead of transcript (now uses SendInput-based typing by default; clipboard is not touched)
- Engine fails on machines without Intel iGPU (now probes available devices upfront)
- Installer fails on virgin Windows with WinError 126 (Visual C++ Redistributable bundled)
- Main window opens too small (size locked)
- Desktop icon was blurry (multi-size .ico with cream rounded plate)

Full notes: https://github.com/Neko-Health/whisper-dictate/releases/tag/v0.2.2
